Targets in the form of self-supporting foils of
natural bismuth metal were prepared using the vacuum
evaporation technique. The target thicknesses were
determined by energy-loss measurements with an 241Am
a source. The mean thicknesses of the two targets
used were determined to be 0.65 and 2.97 mg/cm2.
